title: Salty Crumbly Thai Pumpkin Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix keto-friendly dish featuring salty and crumbly pumpkin pieces stir-fried with rice wine for a burst of flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 cup diced Thai pumpkin
ingredients.notes: use seeds and skin for extra fiber

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup rice wine
ingredients.notes: ensure it's alcohol-free if following a keto diet

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons peanut oil or olive oil
1 teaspoon five spice powder
ingredients.notes: optional for extra depth of flavor

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and five spice powder if using. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the diced pumpkin to the pan. Cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the rice wine. Increase the heat to high and let it boil for a minute or two until most of the liquid evaporates.
Taste and adjust with salt and pepper as needed. Serve hot.
Optional: Garnish with fresh cilantro or green onions before serving.
